title: Xbox undergoes massive restructuring with executive departures and possible layoffs
summary: Microsoft's Xbox division undergoes drastic changes with the resignation of its head of studios, layoff rumors, and a possible spin-off of the company.

title: EA launches an advertising platform that will integrate ads directly into games
summary: Electronic Arts announces a new advertising system that will allow brands to insert ads within the gaming experience, generating debate in the industry.

title: Dead by Daylight celebrates its tenth anniversary with a major overhaul and Scooby-Doo collaboration
summary: Behaviour Interactive reveals news such as a complete visual revamp, mod support, and the addition of an iconic horror character for its tenth anniversary.

title: The Summer Game Fest Nintendo Direct was the most watched and confirms the Ocarina of Time remake
summary: Nintendo's presentation was the most followed of the event, with the trailer for the Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake being the most viewed of all showcases.

title: Massive Final Fantasy sale on Steam and great anticipation for Final Fantasy 7 Revelations
summary: The entire Final Fantasy series is on sale on Steam, while fans return to Remake and Rebirth amid the hype for the next title.

title: Blizzard presents Shion, the new Overwatch hero with inspiration from John Wick and Akira
summary: The new character Shion comes to Overwatch with an agile and innovative skill kit that required the development of new technology due to its complexity.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2 removes most of its controversial microtransactions
summary: Capcom removes the deluxe edition and time-saving microtransactions from Dragon's Dogma 2 after two years of criticism.

title: Gears of War E-Day shows requirements and Halo Campaign Evolved rises in PlayStation pre-order charts
summary: Gears of War E-Day reveals technical specifications while Halo Campaign Evolved climbs in PlayStation pre-orders after its exclusivity announcement.

title: A copy of Super Mario Bros sells for $3 million, historic record
summary: A pristine copy of Super Mario Bros for NES reaches the highest price ever paid for a video game at auction, exceeding $2 million.

title: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines 2 concludes its development with a final patch
summary: The RPG Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines 2 releases its last update and finishes its development, including features requested by the community.

title: Ultimate Marvel vs Capcom 3 receives a surprise patch that destabilizes a character
summary: An unexpected patch for Ultimate Marvel vs Capcom 3 on Steam introduces changes that significantly affect one of the game's best characters.

title: Social media ban for minors in the UK also affects gaming services
summary: The new British law that bans access to social media for minors under 16 extends to gaming services, although it excludes multiplayer mode.

title: Two games on Steam accused of using bots to inflate their player counts
summary: An inactive game and an item marketplace are singled out for using bots to appear among the most popular games on Steam, according to the community.

title: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 4 brings back early campaign access
summary: The next Call of Duty installment again offers early access to the campaign for those who pre-order, a practice absent in recent years.

title: Fox buys Roku in a $22 billion deal
summary: The Fox network acquires the streaming platform Roku in a deal that seeks to strengthen its presence in the streaming market.

title: A group of hackers claims to have stolen data from Nintendo and demands $2 million
summary: A collective of hackers claims to have stolen information from Nintendo and demands a ransom of two million dollars not to release it.

title: Assassin's Creed Shadows receives its final update on June 16
summary: The final update for Assassin's Creed Shadows adds a new story mission and endgame features, closing its support cycle.

title: BioWare co-founder reveals he tried to make Baldur's Gate 3 for years
summary: The former BioWare director says he struggled to secure the rights to Baldur's Gate 3 more than a decade before Larian took on the project.

title: Former Bungie employee says the studio was on the verge of closure before being bought by Sony
summary: A former Bungie employee reveals that the studio faced a severe financial crisis and was very close to closing before the acquisition by Sony.

title: A hide-and-seek game where you paint yourself to camouflage sells one million copies in four days
summary: The indie title that combines hide-and-seek with body paint achieves a sales milestone by reaching one million units sold in less than a week.
